Introduction
Welcome to Module 1.
!
Module 1 is all about the core strategies and tactics of Product Launch Formula.
!
If you don’t go through anything else, if you just go through this, what it’s going to
teach you is how to build a relationship with your prospects and your market... with
your clients... with your would-be clients... and really build a business by building that
relationship and conversation with them.
!
Everything in business is so much easier if you talk to your people and find out what
they want, work with them, help them out, and you will find out what they need next
and then you create that for them.
!
It all ties into your marketing, and your marketing ties into your product.
!
It will literally change the rest of your life if you truly absorb nothing else but what’s in
this module.
!
This core work is going to end up going into all of your launches and all your types of
launches.
!
No matter where you are right now - whether you don’t have a business whatsoever,
with no list and no product... whether you have a great business already with traffic and
a list... whether you’re a practitioner and you want to start leveraging your business...
whether you’re an artist - it doesn’t matter where you’re at, these core strategies and
tactics that we’re going to go through here are going to set you up to build that
relationship, to figure out exactly what people want, and give it to them both in your
marketing and in your product.
!
I know that’s a big promise, but that’s what this module is all about. It’s about creating
the core pieces that are then going to drop into your various launches as we move
through the later modules.
!
In the later modules we’ll be going through each different type of launch (Quick
Launches, Seed Launches, Internal Launches, JV Launches). The core work you do here
will move forward and go into all those other modules.
!
Now, we do have a lot of people that upgrade through each version of Product Launch
Formula. If you’re brand new, trust me, there are people watching this video who have
been with me since 2005 and have upgraded every step of the way.
!
If you’re upgrading, then what we’re covering here in Module 1 is going to be a review
and I’ve gotten a lot better at teaching this and gotten a lot more succinct. It’s a lot
sharper and there is new stuff. You definitely want to go through it.

!
We recently ran a contest where we had our PLF owners create videos talking about
their experience with Product Launch Formula. They sent them in and we gave away
prizes for the best. What I noticed is so many of them mention that they had really put
a lot of time and effort into actually going through the entire Product Launch Formula
product.
!
I’m going to give you a lot of training, a lot of material. I want you to be gentle on
yourself. Don’t feel like you have to keep up with every single video and you have to
keep up with it exactly on time. Almost no one goes through every single video the first
time and stays up to date perfectly and does all the homework.
!
Don’t beat yourself up if you fall behind or if you skip some videos. That’s absolutely
fine, no problem. I do it all the time when I go through training myself. The thing is you
definitely want to circle back and go through the material. Don’t think just because you
watched me do a launch, and then you stepped up and you enrolled that, you magically
know how to do it. There’s a lot of great stuff in here.
!
One of the really important things is, in this module is you’re going to get a bunch of
video training. It’s going to me teaching from the whiteboard, screen capture, just a lot
of resources, and a lot of training. But we’re also going to have this live webinar.
Depending on when you’re watching this it might not be live, you might have to watch
the recording, but it’s still going to be just as awesome.
!
These videos are the core tactics and strategies and then in the webinar we’re actually
going to apply those. I’m going to walk you through the exercises to apply them. These
videos are basically half the module, the webinar is going to be the other half of the
module. Either get on the webinar live or watch the recording, it’s going to be
awesome.
!
One of the key things is that Product Launch Formula is about how to launch products,
businesses, and brands. That’s what you bought. The other thing that I’m going to
sneak in here is really how to build a business.
!
If you look at what I’ve done over the years, no one else has done what I’ve done. I’ve
built this brand in this online marketing world where most of the products have a shelf
life of two or three weeks, or at best measured in months.
!
!
Product Launch Formula has been going since 2005 and I’ve sold over $20,000,000
worth of it. I’ve had over 10,000 people go through the training. It’s a serious brand.
I’m going to teach you how to build a serious business.
☑ 	First, I’m going to teach you about product launches, brand launches, and
business launches.
☑ 	Second, I’m going to teach you how to build a business.

☑ 	Third, I won’t deny it... there is some underlying personal development stuff
within Product Launch Formula.
!
None of us can go and accomplish a big thing like building a business, creating a
business, making your business bigger, without doing some inner work and growing
ourselves.
!
For years I hesitated talking about any of this stuff because I figured, “Who the hell am
I to tell anyone how to live their lives or what to do?” The thing is, if I look back over
the last 20 years since I was first exposed to any personal development, I’ve come a
long way.
!
I’ve got a pretty good life. I’ve got a heck of a lifestyle, I’ve got a great business, I’ve
got a great team, I’ve got a great family, I live in a beautiful place, I’m in very good
health, I’m an athlete, I’m very active, I’ve got great kids, I’ve got a great marriage of
many years. So I guess maybe I do feel that now I can tell you a little bit about what
I’ve done in my life.
!
I’m going to sneak that in here and there. It’s not a big piece, but personal
development, the change starts when you hit that registration button. When you
enrolled in Product Launch Formula, that’s when the change started. That’s when you
said, “I’m going to step up. I’m going to have a bigger life, I’m going to have a bigger
vision, I’m going to have a bigger future.”
!
Frankly, my job is to hold a bigger vision for your future. I know what you can
accomplish, because I know what other Product Launch Formula owners have
accomplished. They’ve done great things and I know you can do great things.
!
Some of the people watching this video will have million dollar businesses. You can
grow your business. Some of the people will be just starting out. You can do this.
Change starts the minute you press that enrollment button. Just being here right now,
you’ve already made a massive change. Congratulations for being here.
!
One of the big things you can do to get the most out of Product Launch Formula is
jump into that community. Being a part of that community, whether it’s giving someone
a pat on the back or making an intelligent comment on a video, or asking a good
question. That can be just as great. Being grumpy, sniping at someone else, that’s not
cool.
!
One of the things I do really well, one of my unique abilities, is fostering community. I
am all about the community in Product Launch Formula. I’m all about the community in
our Product Launch Live events. I’m all about the community in our PLF Platinum
programs.
!
We don’t suffer grumpy people. We have kicked people out of the program and we will
continue to. 99.9% of the people are awesome. People that cause a lot of heartache for
